message:
feat(gateway): Add automated_plan_reviser (apr) CLI integration

- Create apr.service.ts with CLI wrapper for `apr robot` JSON mode
- Add /api/plans routes for workflows, rounds, history, stats, diff
- Includes run endpoint for long-running revision operations
- Support for integration prompts for Claude Code workflows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
